title: euonymus balansae
intro: Euonymus balansae, also known as the Chinese spindle or Balansa spindle tree, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euonymus balansae include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. It is often prepared in herbal tea or powder form, and also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
